description: Create packages/quant-codex - the QuantAI Codex engine that orchestrates full app creation from natural language descriptions. Manages project lifecycle: scaffolding (generate project structure), building (use code generation), testing (run tests and iterate), and deploying (to targets). Integrates conceptually with code-agent for generation and quant-automate for workflow automation.
steps: Create packages/quant-codex/package.json with name @quant/quant-codex, type: module, main/types: src/index.ts, scripts (build: tsc, typecheck: tsc --noEmit, test: vitest run, lint: eslint .), dependency on zod ^3.23.0, devDeps: @types/node ^22.0.0, typescript ~5.5.0, vitest ^2.0.0
Create packages/quant-codex/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with composite: true, outDir: ./dist, rootDir: ./src, include src/**/*

Create src/types.ts with all interfaces: CodexProject (id/name/description/status/steps/artifacts/config), CodexStep (id/type/status/input/output/error/duration), ProjectArtifact (id/type/path/content/metadata), ProjectOptions (template/language/framework/features/testing/deployment), CodexStatus ('scaffolding'|'building'|'testing'|'deploying'|'complete'|'failed'|'iterating'), DeployTarget (type: 'quant-store'|'self-host'|'export', config), BuildResult, TestResult, DeployResult, IterationFeedback, CodexEngine interface (createProject/scaffold/build/test/deploy/iterate/getProject/listProjects)

Create src/scaffolder.ts with ProjectScaffolder class that generates project file structures based on ProjectOptions: determines directory layout, generates package.json/tsconfig.json templates, creates entry points and placeholder files. Returns ProjectArtifact[] representing the scaffolded structure.

Create src/builder.ts with ProjectBuilder class that orchestrates code generation for a project: takes scaffolded artifacts, generates implementation code for each module using a pluggable CodeGenerator interface (default stub that produces typed placeholder implementations), tracks build progress per file

Create src/tester.ts with ProjectTester class that: generates test stubs for artifacts, runs test suites (simulated execution), collects test results, identifies failures, suggests fixes for iteration

Create src/deployer.ts with ProjectDeployer class that handles deployment to different targets: quant-store (package and publish), self-host (generate docker/compose config), export (zip artifacts). Each target has a deploy method returning DeployResult.

Create src/engine.ts with CodexEngineImpl implementing CodexEngine: createProject (initializes project with options), scaffold (delegates to ProjectScaffolder), build (delegates to ProjectBuilder), test (delegates to ProjectTester), deploy (delegates to ProjectDeployer), iterate (applies feedback and re-runs build/test cycle), getProject/listProjects for project management
Create src/index.ts exporting all types, classes, and the engine

Create src/__tests__/engine.test.ts with 9+ tests covering: create project from description, full lifecycle (scaffold->build->test->deploy), project status transitions, iteration with feedback, project listing, error handling on build failure, deploy to different targets, getProject retrieval, concurrent project management

Create src/__tests__/scaffolder.test.ts with 8+ tests covering: scaffold React app, scaffold Node.js API, scaffold with custom options, generate correct file structure, include package.json in artifacts, include tsconfig in artifacts, handle unknown framework gracefully, scaffold with testing framework specified

Create src/__tests__/builder.test.ts with 8+ tests covering: build scaffolded project, generate implementation for each module, track build progress, handle build errors, partial build recovery, code generation with dependencies, build result contains all artifacts, build respects project options
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-codex passes with zero errors
CodexEngine supports full lifecycle: createProject -> scaffold -> build -> test -> deploy
Project status transitions are tracked correctly
Iteration feedback loop works (iterate method re-runs build/test)
findings: All 28 tests pass (10 engine, 9 scaffolder, 9 builder). Typecheck and build pass cleanly. Tests must import describe/it/expect/beforeEach from vitest explicitly. Prettier reformats on commit via lint-staged.
